Home / Services / Windshield Chip Repair

Windshield Chip Repair

Affordable fix for small windshield damage.

Milwaukee's gravel-strewn winter roads lead to countless windshield chips. When caught early, many chips can be repaired without full replacement. Our resin injection process fills the damage, preventing spreading and restoring structural integrity.

We evaluate each chip to ensure it meets repairable size and location criteria. The process takes about 30 minutes - much faster than replacement. While the repair won't be completely invisible, it prevents the damage from worsening and avoids the expense of a new windshield. We recommend addressing chips promptly before temperature changes cause them to spread.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Chip cleaning and preparation
  2. 02 Step 2: Resin injection under vacuum pressure
  3. 03 Step 3: UV curing for maximum strength
  4. 04 Step 4: Final polish and inspection

Benefits

  • Prevents chip from spreading
  • Maintains windshield strength
  • No need for replacement in many cases
  • Quick, affordable solution

Frequently Asked Questions

What types of chips can be repaired?

Most star-shaped chips and bullseyes smaller than a quarter can be repaired if not in the driver's direct line of sight.

Does insurance cover chip repair?

Many Wisconsin policies cover chip repair with no deductible since it prevents more expensive replacement.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with windshield chip repair? Contact us today.

Request Quote Or call: 555-aut-r92
